text:
The department and the Texas Veterans Commission shall jointly develop a one-page informational paper about veterans services provided by this state for veterans who receive:

(1) a driver’s license with a designation under Section 521.1235 (Designator on License Issued to Veteran) ; or

(2) a personal identification certificate with a designation under Section 521.102 (Designator on Personal Identification Certificate Issued to Veteran) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.011 — Services Information for Veterans

The department and the Texas Veterans Commission shall jointly develop a one-page informational paper about veterans services provided by this state for veterans who receive:

    (1) a driver’s license with a designation under Section 521.1235 (Designator on License Issued to Veteran) ; or

    (2) a personal identification certificate with a designation under Section 521.102 (Designator on Personal Identification Certificate Issued to Veteran) .

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1142 (H.B.377), Sec. 4, eff. September 1, 2017.*

a personal identification certificate with a designation under Section 521.102 (Designator on Personal Identification Certificate Issued to Veteran) .
